content.full_text:
California
Ben Adams
2019 No. Beverly Drive
Beverly Hills,
CA
90210
August 20,
1993
Re:
Your Request for Assistance
Our File No.
G-93-306
We have received your request for advice regarding the
Lanteriuan Developmental Disabilities Services Act.
In that letter
you asked for a waiver so that you may become “vendorized.
The Fair Political Practices Commission is charged with
administering and implementing the Political Reform Act.
1
! Your
question does not pertain to the Act.
(See Adams Advice Letters
1—93—174,
1—93—193 and 1-92—653, mailed to you earlier.)
We are
therefore returning your request for advice unanswered.
Your
request should be directed to the agency responsible for
implementing the Lanterman Act.
You may want to contact the
Department of Developmental Services at 1600 9th Street,
Sacramento,
CA
95814.
If you have any questions, please feel free to contact the
Commission’s Legal Division at
(916)
322—5901.
JET/jt
Enclosure
c7
1/
Government Code Sections 81000—91015.
All statutory
references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated.
Commission regulations appear at
2 California Code of Regulations
Section 18000
, g.
All references to regulations are to Title
2,
Division
6 of the California Code of Regulations.
Fair Political
Practices Commission
Dear Mr.
Adams:
Sinc,erely,
‘eanette E.
Turvill
Political Reform Consultant
Legal Division
428 J Street, Suite 800 •
P.O. Box 807 •
Sacramento, CA
95812 •
(916) 322-5660

In that letter you asked for a waiver so that you may become “vendorized. The Fair Political Practices Commission is charged with administering and implementing the Political Reform Act. 1 ! Your question does not pertain to the Act. (See Adams Advice Letters 1—93—174, 1—93—193 and 1-92—653, mailed to you earlier.) We are therefore returning your request for advice unanswered. Your request should be directed to the agency responsible for implementing the Lanterman Act. You may want to contact the Department of Developmental Services at 1600 9th Street, Sacramento, CA 95814.
